Package eu.algites.lib.common.version

Class AIcVersion

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.version.AIcVersion
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<AIcVersion>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AIcCalverLikeVersion, AIcMavenLikeVersion, AIcSemverLikeVersion
public class AIcVersion extends Object implements Comparable<AIcVersion>, Serializable

Title: AIcVersion

Description: Immutable version representation backed by tokenization.

See Also:
